3066110.name: Bladefall
3066110.description:
BladeFall is a fast-paced hack-and-slash game where timing and skill decide every fight. You play as a warrior trapped in a world that seems normal at first, but is actually a simulation created by machines after humanity was wiped out.

Humans once built advanced machines and an AI core to improve life. Instead, it turned against them, destroyed human civilization, and covered the planet with a fake reality. The few survivors are kept inside this artificial world, never seeing the truth.

As you fight your way through enemies and bosses, you start to notice glitches and breaks in the world around you. Bit by bit, you uncover the real world hidden underneath. But the biggest twist comes later: the “reality” you thought you escaped into is also another layer of simulation. You have been trapped inside a simulation within a simulation, controlled by the AI to keep you from discovering the truth.

Your goal is to fight through these layers, expose what the machines are hiding, and reach the core behind it all.

Key Features

• Hack and Slash Combat: Fast, fluid, and timing-based melee action.
• 2.5D Style: A mix of side-scrolling and depth for smooth and clear combat.
• Boss Fights: Challenging battles that test your reactions and skills.
• Simulation Twist: Discover that the world around you has more layers than it first appears.
3066110.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
